title: Secure delivery partner/steward + publish dual-reviewed guide through a vetted family-facing channel
context: Ewing-Family-Guide is a free, plain-language guide for families, caregivers, and AYA patients facing a Ewing sarcoma diagnosis. It ONLY restates and organizes vetted-authority information (NCI/PDQ, COG, ESMO, CCLG), with a citation on every assertion, at a health-literacy reading level. This is HIGH risk-tier, patient-facing health content: nothing patient-facing ships until both a credentialed pediatric/sarcoma oncologist AND a patient/caregiver advocate sign off (version-scoped, either can block). No delivery partner, oncologist reviewer, or patient-advocate reviewer is yet secured. This is the last-mile deed: secure a real family-facing channel and publish ONLY dual-signed-off, cited, accessible pages. The build-vs-hold rule binds — never self-publish unreviewed-channel content to vulnerable families to hit a date. Binding cancer guardrails apply: open-access/aggregate/de-identified educational sources only; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; verify each source license; provenance on every assertion; no medical advice, diagnosis, or individual prognosis.
objective: Secure a delivery partner/steward and publish the dual-reviewed, cited, accessible guide through a vetted family-facing channel, applying the build-vs-hold rule and collecting no PII.
acceptanceCriteria: A real family-facing channel (sarcoma foundation, COG/CCLG-affiliated program, or treating-center patient-education office) is secured; steward assigned; verifiedNeed flips to true
Only dual-signed-off, cited, accessible pages are published/distributed; standing labels and currency (validUntil) in force

Driven by the dated acquisition plan (>=3 partners in conversation by 2026-08-31; reviewers by 2026-10-31); if no partner by 2027-02-28, apply the build-vs-hold rule (pivot beneficiary or hold reviewed-unpublished) — never self-publish unreviewed-channel content to vulnerable families to hit a date
Outcomes (qualitative usefulness, reach) recorded with no PII collected
